detail: Expected prediction rows 78,600 and actual prediction rows 78,600; no out-of-range risks/survivals; no identity or monotonicity violations.
AUC, Brier-related, and threshold outcome metrics are suppressed when binary outcome support is unavailable per QC summary.
support_tier, horizon_evidence_class, claim_restriction_flag, and risk_scale are present in exported long tables.
PNU only has binary outcome support through year 2; SNU and merged retain binary support later but calibration regression support collapses by year 10 because supported bins drop below the minimum.
280 supported calibration rows; 279 fit successfully; 1 supported row failed because of a slope boundary flag (SNU, base, lognormal, year 9).

For PNU years 3-10, observed_ipcw_risk is exported as 1.0 even though binary outcome support is unavailable (nonevent IPCW count = 0). This follows the current code path but is potentially misleading if surfaced later.
Plot panels are structurally consistent with the formula registry; blank PNU/SNU site-added panels reflect unavailable formulas, not missing computation.
